table_base_path.title: Table Base Path
table_base_path.description: Base path for AI-Lake tables. Each stream writes to {table_base_path}/{stream_name}/. Supports s3://, gs://, az://, or local paths.

embed_mode.title: Embedding Mode
embed_mode.description: How to produce embeddings from record text.

text_field.title: Text Field
text_field.description: Record field used as embedding input. Supports dot notation for nested fields (e.g. meta.body).

embedding_dim.title: Embedding Dimension
embedding_dim.description: Vector dimensionality — must match the chosen model.

embedding_model.title: Embedding Model Name
embedding_model.description: Stored as ailake.embedding-model Iceberg property for model tracking.

embed_cmd.title: Embed Command (cmd mode)
embed_cmd.description: Shell command. Receives JSON string array on stdin, writes JSON float[][] to stdout.

openai_base_url.title: OpenAI Base URL
openai_base_url.description: Override for compatible endpoints (Azure OpenAI, local proxies).

http_url.title: HTTP Embed URL
http_url.description: OpenAI-compatible POST endpoint. Body: {"model": "...", "input": [...]}; response: {"data": [{"embedding": [...]}]}. Works with Ollama (/v1/embeddings), vLLM, LM Studio, Together.ai, Azure OpenAI, and any OpenAI-compatible server.

http_model.title: HTTP Model Name
http_model.description: Model name sent in the request body. Example: nomic-embed-text, mxbai-embed-large. Leave empty to omit.

http_auth_header.title: HTTP Authorization Header
http_auth_header.description: Full value of the Authorization header. Example: Bearer sk-... Leave empty for unauthenticated endpoints (e.g. local Ollama).

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Records per embed API call and per write_batch call.

pre_normalize.title: Pre-normalize Vectors
pre_normalize.description: Normalize to unit L2 at write time. Recommended for cosine metric.

pq_only.title: PQ-only (Discard Raw Vectors)
pq_only.description: Maximum compression — raw F16 vectors discarded after index build. No reranking.

partition_fields.title: Multi-column Partition Fields
partition_fields.description: Multi-column Iceberg partition spec (Phase K). Each entry defines a partition field with column, transform (identity or truncate[W]), and column_type. When non-empty, takes precedence over the single-column partition_by field.

transform.title: Transform
transform.description: identity — pass-through; truncate[W] — truncate string to W chars or round int/long down to multiple of W.

column_type.title: Column Type
column_type.description: Iceberg type of the partition column.

format_version.title: Iceberg Format Version
format_version.description: Iceberg format version for new tables. 2 = full ecosystem compatibility (default). 3 = V3 features (deletion vectors, row lineage, variant type) — requires Spark 4+, Trino 450+, or PyIceberg 0.8+.

fts_columns.title: Full-Text Search Columns
fts_columns.description: Text columns to index with Tantivy FTS (Phase T). Enables fast keyword search alongside vector similarity. Empty = no FTS index built (zero overhead, default). Example: ["chunk_text", "document_title"].

fts_tokenizer.title: FTS Tokenizer
fts_tokenizer.description: Tantivy tokenizer name used when fts_columns is non-empty. 'default' = whitespace + lowercase (suitable for most Latin-script text).

hnsw_m.title: HNSW M
hnsw_m.description: HNSW graph connectivity. Higher = better recall, larger index. Typical values: 16 (fast), 32 (balanced), 64 (high recall). Omit to use table default.

hnsw_ef_construction.title: HNSW ef_construction
hnsw_ef_construction.description: HNSW build-time search depth. Higher = better recall at index build cost. Typical values: 100–400. Omit to use table default.

deferred.title: Deferred Index Build
deferred.description: Build HNSW/IVF-PQ index asynchronously (~200k vec/s for Parquet write, index attached in background). Recommended for large batch ingestion. IndexStatus transitions Indexing → Ready.

partition_by.title: Partition Column (Single)
partition_by.description: Single-column Iceberg identity partition. Records are grouped by this field's per-record value and routed to a dedicated partition (Hive-style, one physical location per value) — e.g. "agent_id" or "tenant_id". Records missing this field are written unpartitioned. Ignored when Multi-column Partition Fields is set.

extra_columns.title: Extra Columns
extra_columns.description: Record fields (besides Text Field) written as queryable Parquet columns alongside the embedding — e.g. ["id", "source_url", "created_at"]. Empty (default) = every scalar top-level field the record has. Only str/int/float/bool values are supported; nested objects/arrays are skipped.
